title: Buttery Norwegian Bao Buns
description: A sweet and fluffy bao bun infused with the richness of Norwegian butter. Perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: Adds sweetness to the bao buns

ingredients.name: Egg, beaten
ingredients.notes: Helps to create a rich glaze

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the bao buns on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together the softened butter, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract.
Brush the mixture evenly onto the bao buns.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten egg and milk until well combined.
Brush the egg mixture evenly onto the bao buns.
Bake the bao buns in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Dust the warm bao buns with confectioners' sugar.
